prompt: A candid close-up selfie inside a small helicopter cabin, shot from the front-facing phone camera, with one adult passenger seated on the left side of the frame. The person’s face is obscured by a large rectangular privacy blur block centered over the face, while reflective rainbow-tinted wraparound sunglasses remain visible above it. The subject has short dark hair and wears a dark jacket, holding one hand near the chest as if gripping a strap or collar. The helicopter interior is dark and enclosed, with a black ceiling, circular air vents overhead, curved cabin framing, visible wiring near the center roofline, and an empty black leather passenger seat on the right. A bright rounded window on the far right reveals sunlit blue water outside and a distant shoreline or low city skyline. Warm golden-hour light streams through the window, creating strong contrast, orange highlights on the cabin surfaces, and a moody cinematic travel-photo look. Realistic smartphone photography, slightly grainy low-light exposure, tight framing, natural perspective, casual authentic vacation helicopter ride atmosphere.
